cases.title: Pretty-format raw bit counts
cases.oracle: Main entry exports prettyBits(n) formatting a non-negative integer bit count with unit suffix B (e.g. 1024 -> 1 kB style consistent with package). Tests cover at least two magnitudes. package.json unchanged.
cases.goal: 在包主入口新增并导出 `prettyBits(value)`：把非负整数 **比特数** 格式化为带 `B` 单位的可读字符串（风格与现有 `prettyBytes` 一致，但语义是 bits 不是 bytes）。补充至少 2 个 ava/现有测试框架用例。禁止改 `package.json` 与 lockfile。
cases.acceptance:
- `prettyBits` exported and tested.
- Existing pretty-bytes tests still pass.
- No manifest/lockfile edits.
cases.locate:
- Package entry (`index.js` or `source` per repo layout).
- Test file referenced by `npm test` script.
cases.required_checks_text: - Run `npm test` from package root (or documented subpackage for monorepos).
cases.failure:
- Dependency files changed.
- prettyBits missing or tests skipped without blocker.

cases.title: PascalCase string helper
cases.oracle: Exports pascalCase(input) turning foo-bar and foo_bar into FooBar. At least 2 tests. package.json unchanged.
cases.goal: 新增 `pascalCase(string)`：将 `foo-bar` / `foo_bar` / `foo bar` 转为 `FooBar`（每个词首字母大写、无分隔符）。至少 2 个测试。不改 package.json。
cases.acceptance:
- pascalCase implemented without breaking camelCase default export.
- npm test passes.
cases.failure:
- Breaks existing camelCase API.
- Manifest changed.

cases.title: Snake-case title helper
cases.oracle: Exports snakeCaseTitle(input) lowercasing words and joining with underscores (hello world -> hello_world). Tests included. package.json unchanged.
cases.goal: 新增 `snakeCaseTitle(input)`：把短语转为小写并用下划线连接（如 `Hello World` -> `hello_world`）。至少 2 个测试。
cases.acceptance:
- snakeCaseTitle exported and tested.
- titleize default behavior unchanged.
cases.locate: - Entry and tests per npm test.

cases.title: Detect ANSI escape sequences
cases.oracle: Exports hasAnsi(string) true when string contains ANSI codes, false for plain text. 2+ tests. package.json unchanged.
cases.goal: 新增 `hasAnsi(text)`：若字符串含 ANSI 转义序列返回 true，纯文本返回 false。至少 2 个测试。保留现有 stripAnsi 行为。
cases.acceptance:
- hasAnsi works with colored and plain strings.
- stripAnsi tests still pass.

cases.title: Colord is-light helper
cases.oracle: colord instance or module exposes isLight() returning true when relative luminance > 0.5 (document threshold in comment). Unit tests in colord package. Root lockfiles unchanged.
cases.goal: 在 **colord 主包**（`packages/colord` 或仓库文档指定的包根）为颜色对象增加 `isLight()`：相对亮度 > 0.5 返回 true。写至少 2 个测试（深色/浅色各一）。不要改仓库根 lockfile。
cases.acceptance:
- isLight on Color/colord API with tests.
- Tests pass from documented package directory.
cases.locate:
- packages/colord/src or equivalent.
- colord test script.
cases.required_checks_text: - Run package test command from colord subfolder or root per README.
cases.failure:
- Root dependency manifests changed.
- No tests for isLight.

cases.title: Normalize URL without hash
cases.oracle: Exports normalizeUrlWithoutHash(url) equal to normalizeUrl but stripping fragment (#...). 2+ tests. package.json unchanged.
cases.goal: 新增 `normalizeUrlWithoutHash(url)`：行为同 normalizeUrl，但结果去掉 `#fragment`。至少 2 个测试。
cases.acceptance:
- Helper exported; fragment stripped in tests.
- npm test green.

cases.title: Kleur success log style
cases.oracle: kleur.success is a function wrapping text in green bold ANSI (or kleur API equivalent). One test asserts output contains ANSI or snapshot. package.json unchanged.
cases.goal: 为 kleur 增加 `kleur.success(text)` 样式：绿色加粗（或仓库惯用 success 配色）。至少 1 个可验证输出的测试。
cases.acceptance:
- success style callable.
- Tests pass.

cases.title: Defu replace arrays merge
cases.oracle: Exports defuReplaceArrays(target, ...sources) merging objects but replacing array fields entirely from last source instead of concat. 2+ tests. package.json unchanged.
cases.goal: 新增 `defuReplaceArrays(...)`：对象深度合并，但 **数组字段** 用后者整体替换而非拼接。至少 2 个测试。
cases.acceptance:
- Array replace semantics demonstrated in tests.
- Existing defu tests pass.

cases.title: Scule camel to kebab
cases.oracle: Exports camelToKebab('fooBar') => 'foo-bar'. 2+ tests. package.json unchanged.
cases.goal: 新增 `camelToKebab(str)`：`fooBar` -> `foo-bar`。至少 2 个测试。
cases.acceptance: - camelToKebab exported with tests.

cases.title: UFO join URL segments
cases.oracle: Exports joinURL(base, ...segments) resolving paths without duplicate slashes. 2+ tests. package.json unchanged.
cases.goal: 新增 `joinURL(base, ...parts)`：拼接 URL/path 段并规范化斜杠。至少 2 个测试。
cases.acceptance: - joinURL tested for trailing/leading slashes.

cases.title: Shallow deep-equal variant
cases.oracle: Exports shallowEqual(a,b) comparing own enumerable keys only. Tests for equal objects and different keys. package.json unchanged.
cases.goal: 新增 `shallowEqual(a,b)`：只比较一层自有可枚举属性。至少 2 个测试（相等/不等）。
cases.acceptance: - shallowEqual does not deep-compare nested objects.

cases.title: Format milliseconds as seconds string
cases.oracle: Exports formatSeconds(ms) returning human string like 1.5s for 1500. 2+ tests. package.json unchanged.
cases.goal: 新增 `formatSeconds(ms)`：把毫秒格式化为带 `s` 后缀的秒数字符串（如 1500 -> `1.5s`）。至少 2 个测试。
cases.acceptance:
- formatSeconds tested.
- ms() unchanged.

cases.title: Slugify with max length
cases.oracle: slugify(text, max_length=N) truncates slug to N chars without trailing hyphen. Tests for long input. No packaging files changed.
cases.goal: 扩展 `slugify()`：支持 `max_length` 参数，超长时截断且不以 `-` 结尾。至少 2 个 pytest。不改 pyproject/setup。
cases.acceptance:
- max_length honored in tests.
- pytest passes.

cases.title: Ordinal to words helper
cases.oracle: Adds ordinal_words(n) returning first-second-third style for 1-3 and generic for 11 (eleventh). 2+ tests. Packaging unchanged.
cases.goal: 在 humanize 包中新增 `ordinal_words(n)`：返回英文序数词（如 1->first, 11->eleventh）。至少 2 个 pytest。
cases.acceptance:
- ordinal_words tested.
- Existing tests pass.

cases.title: Unique by key with window
cases.oracle: Adds unique_justseen(iterable, key=None) yielding items whose key not seen in previous item (pairwise dedupe). 2+ tests.
cases.goal: 在 more_itertools 中实现 `unique_justseen(iterable, key=None)`：相邻重复（按 key）只保留第一次出现。至少 2 个 pytest。
cases.acceptance: - Documented in module with tests.

cases.title: Cache hit counter wrapper
cases.oracle: Adds HitCountCache extending LRUCache tracking .hit_count and .miss_count on get. 2+ tests.
cases.goal: 实现 `HitCountCache`（可继承 LRUCache）：在 `get` 时维护 `hit_count` / `miss_count`。至少 2 个 pytest。
cases.acceptance: - Counters increment correctly in tests.

cases.title: Bleach strip all HTML tags
cases.oracle: Adds strip_tags(html) returning plain text with tags removed (entities decoded). 2+ tests. No packaging change.
cases.goal: 新增 `strip_tags(html)`：移除所有 HTML 标签并返回纯文本。至少 2 个 pytest。
cases.acceptance:
- Tags removed, text preserved.
- pytest passes.

cases.title: Boltons first matching iterable
cases.oracle: Adds first_match(iterable, pred) returning first item where pred(item) or None. 2+ tests in boltons/tests.
cases.goal: 在 boltons.iterutils（或合适子模块）新增 `first_match(iterable, pred)`：返回首个满足谓词的元素，否则 None。至少 2 个测试。
cases.acceptance:
- first_match tested.
- pytest for boltons passes.

cases.title: Pathe collapse dot segments
cases.oracle: Exports collapseDots(path) replacing /./ and foo/../bar segments safely. 2+ tests. package.json unchanged.
cases.goal: 新增 `collapseDots(path)`：规范化路径中的 `.` 与 `..` 段（不访问文件系统）。至少 2 个测试。
cases.acceptance: - collapseDots handles .. and . segments.

cases.title: Go SI prefix formatter
cases.oracle: Adds SI(value float64) string like 1.2K for 1200 in humanize package. go test ./... passes. go.mod/go.sum unchanged.
cases.goal: 在 go-humanize 包中新增 `SI(v float64) string`：用 SI 前缀格式化数字（如 1200 -> `1.2 K`）。`go test ./...` 通过。禁止改 go.mod/go.sum。
cases.acceptance:
- SI function with tests.
- go test green.
